title: Frank
description: Silly little mod that displays a bit of extra information in furnace UIs.
body:
![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JbDI6ogH/images/56d9d9933bc2307090e21dacda73965cd1bfbdfb.png)

Simple Minecraft mod that displays a bit of extra information in furnaces. Shows the time remaining & the number of items the furnace can smelt with the available fuel. The different order/visibility combinations of the information lines & the colour the text is rendered in can be configured.

Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/). The configuration screen requires [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/).

## Getting Support

If you find a bug, please file it on [Codeberg](https://codeberg.org/inyourwalls/frank/issues).
